mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO audit_event (
id,
create_time, update_time,
trace_id, client_id, request_id, request_time, accept_language, path, method, user_agent, host, x_forwarded_for, x_real_ip, referer, session_type, passport_id, user_id, name, admin_user, organ_id, organ_name, organ_type, admin_company, application_id, application_code, application_organ_id, payload,
version ) VALUES (
#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{traceId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{clientId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requestId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requestTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{acceptLanguage, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{path, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{method, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userAgent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{host, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{xForwardedFor, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{xRealIp, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{referer, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sessionType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{passportId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminUser, jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{organId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{organName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{organType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminCompany, jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{applicationId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{applicationCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applicationOrganId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{payload, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
0 )

INSERT INTO audit_event (
id,
create_time, update_time,
trace_id, client_id, request_id, request_time, accept_language, path, method, user_agent, host, x_forwarded_for, x_real_ip, referer, session_type, passport_id, user_id, name, admin_user, organ_id, organ_name, organ_type, admin_company, application_id, application_code, application_organ_id, payload,
version ) VALUES
(
#{item.id, jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{item.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{item.traceId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.clientId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.requestId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.requestTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.acceptLanguage, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.path, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.method, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.userAgent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.host, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.xForwardedFor, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.xRealIp, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.referer, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.sessionType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.passportId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.adminUser, jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{item.organId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.organName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.organType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.adminCompany, jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{item.applicationId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.applicationCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.applicationOrganId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.payload, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE audit_event
update_time = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
trace_id = #{traceId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
client_id = #{clientId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
request_id = #{requestId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
request_time = #{requestTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
accept_language = #{acceptLanguage, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
path = #{path, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
method = #{method, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_agent = #{userAgent, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
host = #{host, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
x_forwarded_for = #{xForwardedFor, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
x_real_ip = #{xRealIp, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
referer = #{referer, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
session_type = #{sessionType, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
passport_id = #{passportId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
name = #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
admin_user = #{adminUser, jdbcType=TINYINT},
organ_id = #{organId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
organ_name = #{organName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
organ_type = #{organType, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
admin_company = #{adminCompany, jdbcType=TINYINT},
application_id = #{applicationId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
application_code = #{applicationCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
application_organ_id = #{applicationOrganId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
payload = #{payload, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

UPDATE audit_event
update_time = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
trace_id = #{traceId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
client_id = #{clientId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
request_id = #{requestId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
request_time = #{requestTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
accept_language = #{acceptLanguage, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
path = #{path, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
method = #{method, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_agent = #{userAgent, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
host = #{host, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
x_forwarded_for = #{xForwardedFor, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
x_real_ip = #{xRealIp, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
referer = #{referer, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
session_type = #{sessionType, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
passport_id = #{passportId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
name = #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
admin_user = #{adminUser, jdbcType=TINYINT},
organ_id = #{organId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
organ_name = #{organName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
organ_type = #{organType, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
admin_company = #{adminCompany, jdbcType=TINYINT},
application_id = #{applicationId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
application_code = #{applicationCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
application_organ_id = #{applicationOrganId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
payload = #{payload, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND version = #{version, jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM audit_event WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
SELECT
id,
create_time, update_time,
trace_id, client_id, request_id, request_time, accept_language, path, method, user_agent, host, x_forwarded_for, x_real_ip, referer, session_type, passport_id, user_id, name, admin_user, organ_id, organ_name, organ_type, admin_company, application_id, application_code, application_organ_id, payload,
version FROM audit_event WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
